creator: oleg@bsdpower.com
text:
help2man-1.37.1_1 does not build when WITHOUT_NLS=yes is specified in /etc/make.conf, and consequently, gettext is not installed.

Update log: http://dump.bsdpower.com/2010/03/09/update.log

Configure log: http://dump.bsdpower.com/2010/03/09/config.log

Fix: 

Proposed patch: http://dump.bsdpower.com/2010/03/09/help2man-build-fix.diff
How-To-Repeat: Run `portmaster -ad` on a system which has help2man installed but not gettext.
